data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding verification records with expiry and confidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Verification records with expiry and confidence', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the saga lifecycle but do not include any checks or validations related to verification records, expiry, or confidence. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of verification records with expiry and confidence validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
